summary: Hyunwoo and his companion Tangy arrive at the Valter Mountains to hunt monsters and facilitate Tangy's second awakening. After efficiently leveling up through intense combat, they discover a dungeon called the Ancient Arperium. Upon entering, they encounter a massive Ogre and a giant boss, leading Hyunwoo to decide they should challenge the boss directly to trigger Tangy's final awakening.
key_moments: Hyunwoo and Tangy arrive at the Valter Mountains to hunt high-level monsters.
Hyunwoo realizes the strength of his third awakening and the effectiveness of his Weapon Aura.
The duo discovers the Ancient Arperium dungeon and encounters a giant boss, prompting Hyunwoo to force a confrontation to accelerate Tangy's progress.
